//: mokata MCP server for VS Code / GitHub Copilot Chat. Copy this into your workspace's .vscode/mcp.json (or merge the 'servers' entry). VS Code will discover it; Copilot Chat agent mode can then call mokata's governed MCP tools. mokata's MCP WRITE tools stay human-gated via the WriteGate inside the server. Requires the mokata CLI installed so 'mokata-mcp' is on PATH (pipx install mokata). VS Code asks you to start/trust the server — that step is yours.
